and other advanced retrieval mechanisms. The retrieved documents serve as a knowledge source for the subsequent

generation processis guided by the context provided bytheretrieved documentsensuring that thegeneratedQ&A

Embedding generation and index construction:we compute embeddings from text chunks extracted from the

 Facebook AI Similarity Search (FAISS) (Johnson et al., 2019), a library for efficient indexing and similarity
 search of vectors, to create a database of the embeddings.

•Answer generation: with the question and the retrieved chunks as input, an LLM model was used to synthesize

that are fully correct for all models. As with succinctness, we observe that RAG focuses responses on the most relevant

subset of information.We seethe biggest improvement forVicuna withthe addition ofRAGgoing from 28%to56%

fully correct. Fine-tuned GPT-4 outperforms the rest of the models with and without RAG, with 45% and 61% of

responses fully correct, respectively.
